Now, before we finish up with this module on vision focus, I want to highlight three very important things concerning vision that you really must have to be successful, not just in sales, but in life at any reasonable level. Now number one, okay, and this one we've already spoke about is you have to have a crystal clear vision for your future, right? Goals are not enough. They come and they go while that vision lasts for the long term. And remember, of course, people will buy into your vision. They won't buy into your goals. So once you become a true visionary in your life, you become a leader of people, you become an attractor of talent, and all these people will help you achieve your vision. Okay, so number one, you have to have that super compelling vision for your own future. Number two, and this is crucial, and it relates directly to sales, is you have to have the ability to share that vision. It's essentially to communicate that vision with other people around you in a way that inspires them and moves them to take action. You know what the operative word here is? It's sales, to sell your vision to other people, to get them really into it so that you, they see the value of it, so they want to be a part of it, so it inspires them, okay? And number three, you need to have the strategies, the actual out of words strategies to make that vision real in the actual world. In other words, it's people who just have a great vision and they talk about their experts that you'll be talking about their vision, but they don't actually know the skills that you need to create success in the real world. You know what they become? Delusional. So when it's talking about success and talking about success and paints this great picture of success, but they lack the actual real world strategies to take that vision and make it a reality, the person's delusional. And that, my friends, is where the straight line system for you really makes a huge impact and you begin to realize your vision. You see, you might create this great vision about your life, this, you know, a life of success and abundance where you're in a big house, you know, with a healthy family, you know, living the life you want, traveling, having free time to do what you want to do, whatever you want to do it as much as you want to do it, perhaps with whatever you want to do it with, right? That's your vision. That's my vision, by the way. Yet, if you don't actually have the skill sets to achieve in the real world, then I don't care how vivid that vision is, how real you make it in your own mind. I don't care how good you are at talking to other people about that vision. If you don't have the skills, it's never going to become a reality. And that is what the straight line's all about. It's a skill set. It's going to allow you to go out there and achieve as a sales person, as an influencer, as a closer to how you become one of the top closers in the world. And that will allow you to essentially realize your vision and have the life that you've always dreamed of. That to me is true success. So again, I want you to go through some of the exercises here in the workbook and also the critical incident scenarios, okay, and work on this stuff and create your vision now. Get it going and always be into that vision. And when you read that vision back to yourself, if it doesn't inspire you, if your hair is almost on standing up on it, if you're not tensing your heart beating and you almost want to jump out of bed each morning, then that's not your true vision that inspires you. Your vision should make you want to jump up out of bed each day, run to work, you know, run to the gym, whatever. You know, it's not just about money. It's about the way you live your life. It's about health. It's about wealth. It's about success. It's about giving back. It's about having high personal standards. It's really about you being the best you can possibly be and spreading that wealth around, meeting the wealth of abundance and good tidings and generosity and charity. It's not just about money. That's what my vision for the future is about. It's about impacting other people in a positive way. And to get that, I have to have certain skills at a very high level. One of them is influence. And the world that we live in influences that core skill that allows you to achieve. So as you go through this training, remember that vision comes first in a world first, right? Get things straight. Your belief systems will go through all the stuff in the various modules. You get that vision, you know, that just can move you to take action. And of course, the straight line system, which is your tool, almost your, that sharp saw that's going to cut through all the bull crap of life and get exactly what you want. Okay? See you in the next module.
